gold: Quería solicitar una ascensión de la tarjeta.
predicted: Solicitar una extensión de la tarjeta.
werNormalizedGold: queria solicitar una ascension de la tarjeta

sigWerNormalizedGold: queria solicitar una ascension de la tarjeta

sigWerErrors.reason: The omission of 'queria' removes the subject's intent ('I wanted'), which changes the meaning of the sentence significantly.
'Ascension' (promotion/upgrade) and 'extension' (lengthening) are different actions regarding a card; this changes the request's meaning.
